programme.title: Storage Wars Texas

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: An old adversary pops up in the Houston suburb of Conroe; Moe and Mary feel the pressure; Ricky and Bubba try to profit from paranoia.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny starts seeing things during a very hot day in Riverside, Calif.; Ivy gives Mary a boost; Shana and Edwina stumble across their own paradise.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi and Jarrod split up; Ivy hires a new employee to take care of the shop; Darrell finds success again; Rene learns how to strip.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy tries to continue his winning streak; Rene and Darrell play mind games; Jarrod and Brandi visit a crime scene and travel back in time.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod hopes that scoring more lockers will prevent Brandi from closing the store in Long Beach; Ivy attempts to intimidate the other bidders; Rene's cockiness could prove to be a detriment.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers are in Upland, Calif.; Barry brings an advantage; Darrell gets shut out; Jarrod and Brandi fall in love with a furniture locker; Dave goes all out on a jewelry unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The competition is stiff at a high-end storage facility; Dave and Jarrod find a unit containing a classic Jaguar; Brandi and Jarrod engage in a battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: A man shoots his wife, and the crime is caught on camera; questions are asked if the act was a cold-blooded murder or a justified act of self-defense.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend; the prosecution say he's a killer, but the defense argues he was under attack and shot in self-defense.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: Late night in the Bronx, an off-duty Correction Officer believes he's been shot at by the occupants of a vehicle; he returns fire, killing a teenage passenger; a "Gel Bead Blaster" is found in the vehicle.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: The target of a drive-by shooting in Tulsa, Okla., walks away from the attack, while his girlfriend is not so fortunate; police uncover a long-simmering feud as they hunt for the killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Old habits die hard when a young father gets out of prison and is drawn back into his old life; after he's shot dead, Tulsa, Okla., homicide must sort through a web of lies to find out who killed him.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Police investigate the killing of a man in a New Orleans motel room; a night of drinking in Tulsa, Okla., sparks a murderous rage, resulting in a man being stabbed 21 times.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When a robbery ends in bloodshed, Detective Jeff Gatwood discovers the reach of a Tulsa gang extends beyond prison walls.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Mobile, Ala., a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras; in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A North Charleston man asking for help at a stranger's doorstep dies from a gunshot wound to the leg, and the search for the shooter leads in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, two best friends are murdered in a public park after setting up a meeting through Instagram.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Officer Cam
programme.desc: Inside two of America's most pressurized jails, the cameras are always rolling; in Clayton County, Georgia, crumbling infrastructure, limited shower access and shrinking free time have pushed inmates to a breaking point; tensions boil over into confrontations; officers are attacked. Inmates fashion weapons; what begins as frustration over living conditions escalates into every jail administrator's

programme.title: Behind Bars: Officer Cam
programme.desc: In Clayton County Jail, an inmate attacks another in handcuffs in one of the facility's most alarming acts of violence. Elsewhere, what looks like a fight reveals a far more complicated story once investigators piece together the full picture.
